subject: Can't access SharePoint — long email thread below
description:
Hi IT,

I've been going back and forth with my team about this but nobody can figure it out. I can't access the Finance Q4 SharePoint site since Monday morning. Getting 'Access Denied' every time.

--- Original message ---
From: karen.mills@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 4:45 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com
Subject: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: Q4 SharePoint access

Thanks everyone for the suggestions. I tried clearing my cache like David said but it didn't help. Also tried a different browser (Edge, Chrome, Firefox) — same error in all of them. I was able to access it fine last week.

--- Original message ---
From: david.park@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 4:30 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com
Subject: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: Q4 SharePoint access

Karen, try clearing your browser cache and cookies. That fixed it for me last month when I had a similar issue.

--- Original message ---
From: sarah.jones@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 4:15 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com
Subject: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: Q4 SharePoint access

I can access it fine. Maybe it's a permissions thing? Did someone change the group membership recently?

--- Original message ---
From: mike.chen@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 3:58 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com
Subject: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: Q4 SharePoint access

Same here, works for me. Karen, are you on VPN or in the office?

--- Original message ---
From: karen.mills@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 3:45 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com
Subject: RE: RE: RE: RE: Q4 SharePoint access

I'm in the office, Floor 3. VPN shouldn't matter since I'm on the corporate network.

--- Original message ---
From: david.park@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 3:30 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com
Subject: RE: RE: RE: Q4 SharePoint access

Karen, can you try incognito mode?

--- Original message ---
From: karen.mills@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 3:15 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com
Subject: RE: RE: Q4 SharePoint access

Yes I tried that too. No luck.

--- Original message ---
From: sarah.jones@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 3:00 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com
Subject: RE: Q4 SharePoint access

Maybe IT needs to look at it? The permissions might have changed during last week's migration.

--- Original message ---
From: karen.mills@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 2:45 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com

Hey team, is anyone else having trouble accessing the Finance Q4 SharePoint site? I keep getting an Access Denied error. Need to upload the quarterly report by EOD Monday.

Thanks,
Karen Mills

subject: Broken monitor displaying vertical lines and flickering
description:
My external monitor (Dell U2722D, asset tag CT-MN-08834) has been showing vertical colored lines and flickering intermittently since this morning. I've tried swapping the USB-C cable and using the DisplayPort connection but the issue persists.

Here's a screenshot of the error: data:image/png;base64,

The lines appear to be about 2 pixels wide and are mostly green and magenta. The flickering happens every 10-15 seconds and lasts about 2 seconds each time. This is making it impossible to work on spreadsheets. Can someone from the hardware team come take a look? I'm on the 14th floor, desk 14-227.
attachments.subject: Screenshot of error attached (see inline image)
attachments.description:
Hi support,

My Outlook keeps showing this error when I try to send emails with large attachments. Here's a screenshot:

[image: data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVR42mNk+M9QDwADhgGAWjR9awAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==]

[image: data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAoAAAAKCAYAAACNMs+9AAAAFUlEQVR42mNk+M9Qz0AEYBxVSF+FABJADfl50BorAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC]

[image: data:image/jpeg;base64,]

The error says something about exceeding the 25MB attachment limit but the file I'm trying to send is only 15MB. This started happening after the Outlook update last week. I need to send this contract to a client by end of day.

Thanks,
Robert

attachments.subject: SSO Login Failure - Cannot Access Finance Portal
attachments.description:
Hi IT Support Team,

I have been unable to log in to the Finance Reporting Portal since this morning. When I try to authenticate through SSO, I get the following error:

Error Code AADSTS700016
Message Application with identifier 'a3f8c92-1d4e-4b6a-9c87-2e5f1a3b7d90' was not found in the directory 'contoso.com'
Timestamp 2026-03-18 08:45:12 UTC

This is blocking our month-end close process. Could you please escalate this urgently?


Rachel Goldstein

Director, Financial Reporting

Contoso Financial Services

T: +1 (212) 555-0192 | M: +1 (646) 555-0234
attachments.subject: URGENT - Printer not working & need help ASAP!!!
attachments.description:
Hi IT Team,

The printer on Floor 5 (HP LaserJet Pro M404n) is showing an "Paper Jam" error but there's no paper jammed anywhere. I've checked all the trays and the back panel.

I've tried:

  • Power cycling the printer
  • Removing and reinserting all paper trays
  • Clearing the print queue

Nothing works. I have 200 pages of compliance reports that need to be printed and distributed by 3 PM today for the board meeting.


Thanks,
Amanda Torres

Amanda Torres | Compliance Manager
Contoso Financial Services
Tel: +1 (555) 987-6543 | Fax: +1 (555) 987-6544

attachments.subject: Re: Re: Re: Re: Fwd: Re: SAP Error - Transaction SE16N Access Denied
attachments.description:
Hi all — I'm now getting a completely new error in SAP. When I try to run transaction SE16N to query the BSEG table, I get: "You are not authorized to use transaction SE16N (authorization object S_TCODE)." This is different from the licensing issue we discussed last week. Can someone look into my authorization profile?

— Karen

On Tue, 17 Mar 2026 at 15:20, Robert Vasquez <r.vasquez@contoso.com> wrote:
> Karen, the licensing issue has been resolved. Finance now has 45 concurrent SAP GUI licenses > which should be more than enough. If you're still seeing errors, it might be a different issue.
>
> On Tue, 17 Mar 2026 at 11:40, Karen Whitfield <k.whitfield@contoso.com> wrote:
> > Thanks Robert. So just to confirm — we do NOT need to upgrade to S/4HANA to fix this? > > Michael said below that we might need to.
> >
> > On Mon, 16 Mar 2026 at 16:55, Robert Vasquez <r.vasquez@contoso.com> wrote:
> > > No, Michael is incorrect about the S/4HANA requirement. This is purely a concurrent license > > > count issue on our ECC 6.0 system. I've submitted the PO to increase our license count from > > > 30 to 45. Should be active by EOD tomorrow.
> > >
> > > On Mon, 16 Mar 2026 at 14:10, Michael Torres <m.torres@contoso.com> wrote:
> > > > I looked into this and I believe the issue is that our SAP system needs to be upgraded to > > > > S/4HANA. The current ECC 6.0 system may not support the number of users we have.
> > > >
> > > > On Mon, 16 Mar 2026 at 10:30, Karen Whitfield <k.whitfield@contoso.com> wrote:
> > > > > Hi team,
> > > > >
> > > > > Multiple users in Finance are getting "License limit exceeded" errors when trying to > > > > > log into SAP this morning. We have at least 8 people affected. This is blocking our > > > > > AP processing.

attachments.subject: WiFi connectivity issues on Floor 3

Details:

- Signal strength shows 3/4 bars but pages wonâ€™t load
- Started around 8:00Â AM this morning

I tried forgetting the network and reconnecting but got an error: â€œUnable to connect to this networkâ€. My colleague AndrÃ©s tried switching to the 5GHz band but it didnâ€™t help either. attachments.subject: SQL Server connection timeouts causing ETL pipeline failures
attachments.description:
Our nightly ETL pipeline started failing at approximately 07:01 UTC this morning with SQL Server connection timeout errors. Multiple data pipelines that feed into the analytics warehouse are affected. Here are the logs from the past hour:

timestamp,severity,error_code,source,message,connection_id
2026-03-18T07:01:12.445Z,ERROR,SQL-4221,SQLSERVER01,Connection timeout after 30000ms,conn_8a3f1d
2026-03-18T07:01:14.112Z,ERROR,SQL-4221,SQLSERVER01,Connection timeout after 30000ms,conn_9b2e4c
2026-03-18T07:01:15.887Z,WARN,SQL-3010,SQLSERVER01,Connection pool exhausted (max=200),pool_main
2026-03-18T07:01:18.223Z,ERROR,SQL-4221,SQLSERVER01,Connection timeout after 30000ms,conn_7c5d2a
2026-03-18T07:01:19.556Z,ERROR,SQL-4400,SQLSERVER01,Deadlock detected on resource RID: 6:1:4520:0,spid_87
2026-03-18T07:01:22.789Z,ERROR,SQL-4221,SQLSERVER02,Connection timeout after 30000ms,conn_3f8a1b
2026-03-18T07:01:24.001Z,WARN,SQL-3015,SQLSERVER02,Long-running query detected (>60s),query_44521
2026-03-18T07:01:25.334Z,ERROR,SQL-4221,SQLSERVER01,Connection timeout after 30000ms,conn_2d7e9f
2026-03-18T07:01:27.667Z,ERROR,SQL-4221,SQLSERVER01,Connection timeout after 30000ms,conn_1a4b8c
2026-03-18T07:01:28.990Z,ERROR,SQL-4400,SQLSERVER01,Deadlock detected on resource RID: 6:1:4520:0,spid_92
2026-03-18T07:01:31.112Z,WARN,SQL-3010,SQLSERVER01,Connection pool exhausted (max=200),pool_main
2026-03-18T07:01:33.445Z,ERROR,SQL-4221,SQLSERVER02,Connection timeout after 30000ms,conn_6e3c7d
2026-03-18T07:01:35.778Z,ERROR,SQL-4221,SQLSERVER01,Connection timeout after 30000ms,conn_5f2a1b
2026-03-18T07:01:38.001Z,ERROR,SQL-4221,SQLSERVER01,Connection timeout after 30000ms,conn_4d9e8c
2026-03-18T07:01:40.334Z,WARN,SQL-3015,SQLSERVER02,Long-running query detected (>60s),query_44523
2026-03-18T07:01:42.667Z,ERROR,SQL-4221,SQLSERVER01,Connection timeout after 30000ms,conn_8b1c3d
2026-03-18T07:01:44.990Z,ERROR,SQL-4400,SQLSERVER01,Deadlock detected on resource RID: 6:1:7891:0,spid_104
2026-03-18T07:01:47.112Z,ERROR,SQL-4221,SQLSERVER02,Connection timeout after 30000ms,conn_7a2d4e
2026-03-18T07:01:49.445Z,ERROR,SQL-4221,SQLSERVER01,Connection timeout after 30000ms,conn_9c3f5a
2026-03-18T07:01:51.778Z,WARN,SQL-3010,SQLSERVER01,Connection pool exhausted (max=200),pool_main
2026-03-18T07:02:20.112Z,CRITICAL,SQL-5001,SQLSERVER01,Service broker endpoint stopped responding,svc_broker_main

As you can see, we're getting a massive number of timeouts and deadlocks, and the connection pool is being exhausted repeatedly. The service broker also went down at 07:02. Can the DBA team please investigate SQLSERVER01 and SQLSERVER02 urgently? Our morning reports for the C-suite are delayed.

attachments.subject: 🏢 Conference Room Booking Question ❓📅
attachments.description:
Hey there!! 👋👋👋

🤔 Quick question about booking conference rooms 🏢💻

I need to book the BIG meeting room on the 12th floor 🎉🎉 for our ✨ Q1 Marketing Review ✨ next Wednesday (March 25th 📅). 

Here's what I need:
┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ 📋 Meeting Details                      │
├─────────────┬───────────────────────────┤
│ 📅 Date     │ March 25, 2026            │
│ ⏰ Time     │ 2:00 PM - 4:00 PM        │
│ 👥 People   │ ~20 attendees             │
│ 🖥️ A/V      │ Projector + Video conf    │
│ 🍕 Catering │ Yes please!! 😋           │
└─────────────┴───────────────────────────┘

Thanks so much!! 🙏✅💡🔔

● Jessica Park ●
■ Marketing Coordinator ■
□ Contoso Financial Services □

attachments.subject: lptop issu
Suspicious phishing email received - DO NOT CLICK
attachments.description:
I received a suspicious email this morning at approximately 9:15 AM from what appears to be our CEO's email address (but slightly misspelled as ceo@contos0.com with a zero instead of an 'o'). The email asks me to urgently click a link to "verify my direct deposit information" for an "upcoming payroll change." The link goes to https://contoso-hr-update.suspicious-domain.xyz/verify which does NOT look like our real HR system. I did NOT click the link. The email also contained a PDF attachment called "Payroll_Update_March_2026.pdf" which I also did not open. This seems like a phishing attempt targeting our department.

attachments.subject: Database connection timeout
attachments.description:
SELECT * FROM production.client_accounts WHERE status = 'active' AND last_login < '2026-01-01' ORDER BY account_value DESC;

-- Above query has been timing out for the past 3 hours on the prod SQL Server instance (sql-prod-east.contoso.internal). Normally runs in ~2 seconds. Connection string: Server=sql-prod-east.contoso.internal;Database=ClientDB;Trusted_Connection=True;Connection Timeout=30;

I checked sys.dm_exec_requests and there are 47 blocked sessions. Looks like there might be a long-running transaction holding locks. The blocking_session_id points to SPID 89 which has been running for 6+ hours.

This is affecting the client portal — customers can't view their account balances. ~500 users impacted based on the error rate in Application Insights.

Resource group: rg-data-prod-east
Server: sql-prod-east (Azure SQL Managed Instance, Business Critical tier)
Database: ClientDB

attachments.subject: Need help with اتصال VPN مشكلة — mixed language ticket
attachments.description:
مرحبا فريق الدعم التقني,

I'm having trouble with my VPN connection. عندما أحاول الاتصال I get error code 812. I've been working remote from our Dubai office هذا الأسبوع and the VPN was working fine until this morning.

I tried:
- إعادة تشغيل الكمبيوتر (restarting my computer)
- Clearing the VPN client cache
- تحديث تطبيق GlobalProtect (updating GlobalProtect)

My colleague أحمد is having the same issue. We both need VPN access for the client demo tomorrow.

شكرا,
Omar Hassan
Senior Consultant
Contoso Financial Services — Dubai Office

attachments.subject: Phishing email with multiple suspicious links - please investigate
attachments.description: Hi Security Team, I'm forwarding a suspicious email I received today. It pretends to be from our IT department and asks me to "update my credentials" but it contains a LOT of suspicious links. Here's the content of the email: ---BEGIN FORWARDED EMAIL--- Dear Employee, Your account security needs to be updated. Please click the link below: https://contoso-it-security.com.suspicious-site.ru/update?user=tmorris&token=a8f3e2 If you cannot click the link above, try one of these mirrors: https://contoso.com.login-verify.xyz/auth/portal https://secure-contoso-portal.tk/account/verify?ref=email_031826 http://192.168.44.128:8080/phish/landing.html?id=4421 https://c0ntoso-security.com/update-credentials For reference, your account information: Profile: https://portal.contoso.com/users/tmorris (this one looks real but idk) Department page: https://intranet.contoso.com/compliance/team (also looks legit) Additional resources: https://contoso-benefits.suspicious-domain.net/enroll?campaign=spring2026 https://hr-contoso.phishy-host.co/direct-deposit/update https://mail-contoso-com.xyz/webmail/index.php Best regards, IT Security Team https://it-security-contoso.fake-domain.org/about-us [Tracking images detected in email source] ---END FORWARDED EMAIL--- I did NOT click any of these links. This is clearly a phishing attempt. The sender address was it-security@contos0.com (note the zero in 'contoso'). Please block these domains and alert the company.

attachments.subject: Microsoft Teams keeps crashing / Teams se congela constantemente
attachments.description:
Hi, I need help with Microsoft Teams. It keeps freezing and crashing on my laptop. Esto empezó ayer por la tarde cuando estaba en una llamada con el equipo de Buenos Aires. The screen goes completely white and then I get the spinning wheel por como 30 segundos y después se cierra solo.

I already tried reinstalling pero no funcionó — the same thing happens. Mi versión de Teams es 24360.1303.3160.5765 and I'm running Windows 11. Every time I join a video call con más de 5 personas, se congela completamente.

También probé clearing the cache (borré la carpeta %appdata%/Microsoft/Teams) but the problem persists. É muito frustrante porque tenho reuniões importantes esta semana. Meu colega João também está tendo o mesmo problema.

Can you please look into this? Necesito una solución urgente porque tenemos la reunión de revisión trimestral mañana y no puedo usar Teams así. If it helps, my laptop is a Surface Pro 9 with 16GB RAM, asset tag CT-LT-31205.

Gracias / Thanks / Obrigado,
Carlos Mendoza
HR Business Partner — Américas

attachments.subject: ADF Pipeline PL_IngestDailyTransactions failed - SQL timeout
attachments.description:
The daily ingestion pipeline PL_IngestDailyTransactions in Azure Data Factory failed this morning after retrying 3 times. It could not copy data from SQL Server to ADLS. Here's the full error output:

{
  "error": {
    "code": "PipelineFailedExecution",
    "message": "Pipeline 'PL_IngestDailyTransactions' failed with error: Activity 'CopyFromSQLToADLS' failed.",
    "target": "PL_IngestDailyTransactions",
    "details": [
      {
        "code": "2011",
        "message": "Copy activity failed due to timeout when reading from SQL Server source.",
        "target": "CopyFromSQLToADLS",
        "activityRunId": "b3e7a1c9-4f82-4d6a-a1b3-8c9d0e1f2a3b",
        "pipelineRunId": "d5f8c2e1-6a93-4b7d-b2c4-9d0e1f2a3b4c",
        "errorCode": "SqlServerConnectorFailure",
        "failureType": "UserError",
        "duration": "00:32:14.7821543",
        "source": {
          "type": "SqlServerSource",
          "server": "sqlserver-prod-east.database.windows.net",
          "database": "TransactionsDB",
          "query": "SELECT * FROM dbo.DailyTransactions WHERE TransactionDate = '2026-03-17'",
          "queryTimeout": "00:30:00"
        },
        "sink": {
          "type": "AzureBlobFSSink",
          "container": "raw",
          "path": "transactions/daily/2026/03/17/",
          "format": "Parquet"
        },
        "retryAttempt": 3,
        "retryInterval": "00:05:00"
      }
    ],
    "innererror": {
      "code": "SqlFailedToConnect",
      "message": "A network-related or instance-specific error occurred while establishing a connection to SQL Server.",
      "source": ".Net SqlClient Data Provider"
    },
    "correlationId": "7f8e9d0c-1b2a-3c4d-5e6f-7a8b9c0d1e2f",
    "factoryName": "adf-contoso-prod",
    "region": "eastus",
    "timestamp": "2026-03-18T05:32:14.782Z"
  }
}

This pipeline runs every day at 05:00 UTC and feeds into our downstream analytics. The morning dashboards are currently showing stale data from yesterday. Please investigate the SQL Server connectivity issue.

subject: Network issue — see attached log (300MB)
description:
Our entire floor (Building 2, Floor 7) has been experiencing intermittent network drops every 15-20 minutes since Monday. I've captured packet traces and switch logs. The drops last about 30-60 seconds each time and affect both wired and wireless connections.

I noticed the issue correlates with spikes in broadcast traffic from what looks like a misconfigured device at MAC address AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF. The ARP table shows this device flip-flopping between two IP addresses.

Attaching everything I've gathered — sorry about the file sizes, the pcap alone is quite large.

subject: Software request + question + complaint + follow-up on old ticket + unrelated FYI
description:
Hey IT, several things:

1) I need Visio Professional installed on my laptop (asset tag CT-L-4892). My manager approved it last week — approval ticket is REQ-2341.

2) Quick question — is there a way to increase my OneDrive storage quota? I'm at 95% capacity and keep getting warnings.

3) Also, the response time on my last ticket (INC-4100) was terrible. I waited 3 days for someone to look at it and then the fix didn't even work. The printer on Floor 3 is STILL jamming every 20 pages. I've reported this 4 times now.

4) Oh and FYI — the coffee machine in the 2nd floor kitchen is broken again. I know that's not IT but I don't know who else to tell.

5) One more thing — my colleague Sarah needs access to the same SharePoint site I requested last month. Can you add sarah.chen@contoso.com to the Finance Reports site? She just transferred to our team.

Thanks,
Michael
